title: spermacoce domingensis
intro: Spermacoce domingensis, also known as Spermacoce or Tejeras, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a low-growing herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as wound healing, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Spermacoce domingensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create herbal teas and remedies for its medicinal uses.
